title: gh-143820: ENTER_EXECUTOR can be inserted after BINARY_OP_INPLACE_ADD_UNICODE
author: Fidget-Spinner
body:
<!--
Thanks for your contribution!
Please read this comment in its entirety. It's quite important.

# Pull Request title

It should be in the following format:

```
gh-NNNNNN: Summary of the changes made
```

Where: gh-NNNNNN refers to the GitHub issue number.

Most PRs will require an issue number. Trivial changes, like fixing a typo, do not need an issue.

# Backport Pull Request title

If this is a backport PR (PR made against branches other than `main`),
please ensure that the PR title is in the following format:

```
[X.Y] <title from the original PR> (GH-NNNNNN)
```

Where: [X.Y] is the branch name, for example: [3.13].

GH-NNNNNN refers to the PR number from `main`.

-->


<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-143820 -->
* Issue: gh-143820
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body:
<!-- changes-requested -->
When you're done making the requested changes, leave the comment: `I have made the requested changes; please review again`.
<!-- /changes-requested -->

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body:
> It is the assert that needs changing. You'll need to use `_Py_GetBaseCodeUnit`

It matters because we get the next instruction's oparg and check it `next_oparg = next_instr->op.arg;`. ENTER_EXECUTOR overrides the oparg. If we use `_Py_GetBaseCodeUnit`, it will significantly slow down the current code, so I choose to deopt instead.

comments.author: markshannon
markshannon
comments.body:
We could avoid accessing the following instruction's `oparg` by storing the local variable's index in the inline cache.
It would also then be able to handle:
```
BINARY_OP # To be specialized
EXTENDED_ARG # 1 to 3 of these
STORE_FAST
```

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body: Not sure I have time to fix this up for merge. @cocolato really sorry but can I let you take over this fix?

comments.body:
> Not sure I have time to fix this up for merge. @cocolato really sorry but can I let you take over this fix?

No worries at all! I can take it over from here. Thanks for getting it started.

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body: Thanks Hai Zhu, I will close this PR then.
